Home › Lake County › Gluten-Free Restaurants

Gluten-Free Restaurants in Lake County

19 restaurants with gluten-free options in Lake County, every one graded from its most recent Florida DBPR inspection. 8 currently hold an A, on an average 4.3-star diner rating.

19 gluten-free restaurants

  • A 100 O
    OUTBACK STEAKHOUSE American ★ 4.2 (3337) Leesburg · Lake County GFDF +5 more Inspected Apr 2026
  • A 99 A
    APPLEBEES NEIGHBORHOOD GRILL & BAR American ★ 4 (2367) The Villages · Lake County VegGF +5 more Inspected Oct 2025
